turns.q: I placed an order a few days ago and still have no tracking — where is it?
turns.replyTail:
Bloom & Wild Chat
Willow

Hello Benchmark!

I'm Willow, Bloom & Wild's virtual assistant, how can I help you?

06:30
I placed an order a few days ago and still have no tracking — where is it?
06:30
Willow

We are sorry to hear you have not received tracking yet. To look into this, please share your order number and the postcode linked to the order. You can find the order number in your original email, or use the personal feedback code on the back of your gift card.

06:30
⚡ by DigitalGenius
